data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for bulk code generation for partners.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement for 'Bulk code generation for partners'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this feature. The linked use case mentions the need for bulk code generation but lacks the necessary details to assert its implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of bulk code generation for partners.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
